# J2z

> Free forever URL shortener, QR code generator, and link-in-bio tool. No fees, no paid tier, no credit card required.

## Product

- **URL Shortener**: unlimited short links, free, with click analytics
- **QR Codes**: generate a QR code for any URL; the destination can be edited anytime without reprinting or breaking the code
- **Bio Link Pages**: j2z.com/yourname — a Linktree-style page for all your links, with featured link, social icons, custom button styles, per-link click analytics, and email capture

## Key facts

- 100% free, forever — no premium tier, no paid plan
- 0% fee on every bio page link, always
- No credit card required to sign up (email or Google account only)
- Short links and QR codes route through a permanent j2z.com URL, so the destination can be edited anytime without reprinting or breaking existing links

## Pages

- Homepage: https://j2z.com
- Pricing: https://j2z.com/pricing.md
- Terms: https://j2z.com/terms
- Privacy: https://j2z.com/privacy
